The '''siege of Nulan VI''' was a battle that took place some time after the introduction of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] into the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and the formation of the [[Scimitar assault wing]].

==History==
The celestial body [[Nulan VI]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebelled]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and came under siege. The [[Scimitar assault wing]] was instrumental in ending the siege, when they utilized a tactic of deep-atmospheric precision [[Bomber/Legends|bombing]] to force Nulan VI's [[Unidentified Nulan VI capital|capital]] to surrender.<ref name="ISB" />
